voice_observations.caption_text:

voice_observations.voiceover_text: Calm down, calm down Calm down, eventually I think it was a really great session. It helps me to improve mental clarity as well as helping me to stay present. It was an amazing session. It helps me to relax myself. It was a great session. It helped to reduce anxiety and also to improve emotional regulation. It's a great session to help you relax your mind and your body and I think we really need it. The meditation class, it helped us to calm our mind in a world so noisy and so demanding. It gives us opportunity to pause, to breathe and align our body and our soul. In stillness, we find strength. www.mooji.org
